page: Amazon Web Services c8gd.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by 96 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz. The server features 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It includes 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, managed under the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU and Geekbench multi-core scores placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory performance is also highly rated, with read-only cached small block bandwidth reaching 11081.05 GB/sec and large block write bandwidth at 201.46 GB/sec. The system demonstrates strong single-core performance in Geekbench and PassMark tests, though single-threaded gzip compression and single-core stress-ng benchmarks sit in the average tier. It also achieves top-tier results in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput.

While the instance excels in multi-threaded compute, software compilation, and database operations, it exhibits weaker performance in low-parameter LLM text generation, where the 135M model text generation falls into the bottom 25%. However, text generation for larger 7B and 70B models remains in the top tier. Given the high-density ARM64 compute cores, fast local NVMe storage, and high memory bandwidth, this instance is highly suited for multi-threaded workloads, high-throughput web serving, database hosting, and software compilation.
description: Amazon Web Services c8gd.24xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance powered by 96 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 physical cores operating at 2.8 GHz. It features 192.0 GB of memory, 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show top-tier multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations. While single-core performance is strong to average, the instance excels in highly parallelized tasks, software compilation, and high-throughput web serving. It represents a resource-dense, cost-efficient option for workloads requiring high-performance ARM compute paired with fast local storage, such as database hosting, Redis deployments, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8gd.24xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance featuring 96 Graviton physical cores, 192 GB RAM, and 5700 GB local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database and multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: A high-density ARM64 compute instance featuring dedicated Graviton cores and fast local NVMe storage for demanding multi-threaded workloads.

192.0 GB of system memory and 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
